prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年第12名（与哈工大本部共享排名），属顶尖工科强校；哈工大品牌整体 声誉中性偏正面；抖音综合热度排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映社会关注度高；近年未见明显投档断档记录；力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程 A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A等，工科实力顶尖，与威海校区招生专业高度关联。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3513名、2026年计划大幅缩招约32%（竞争加 剧）、河北省物理类考生微增及哈工大品牌高热等因素；预测2026年物理类最低位次约2889名，区间2542–3236名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5302 → 5819 → 4796 → 3628 → 3513. Since 2023, the ranking has been moving forward (increased competition), stabilizing in the 3500–3600 range in recent two years, with a baseline of about 3513 in 2025.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 137 in 2021–2022, 126 in 2023, 128 in 2024, and 147 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 100, a significant reduction of about 32% compared to 2025, which sharply intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking (shared with HIT main campus), a top-tier engineering powerhouse; HIT brand overall reputation is neutral to positive; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 10th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting strong public attention; no significant admission gaps in recent years; Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with top engineering strength highly correlated with Weihai campus admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class, Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class) and other majors are currently high-heat directions; Hebei Province 2026 Physics Category candidates about 365,000, slightly increased from 2025, expanding the competition base; the university is located in Weihai, Shandong, not within Hebei Province, but the HIT brand has strong national appeal, with limited impact of region on Hebei candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3513, the significant enrollment reduction of about 32% in 2026 (intensified competition), a slight increase in Hebei Physics Category candidates, and the high heat of the HIT brand; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 Physics Category is about 2889, with a range of 2542–3236.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Software Engineering
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electrical and Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Mathematics Class
- Economics and Management Experimental Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If ranking is within the predicted range of 2542–3236, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 2500), focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors; if ranking is near the lower limit of the range (e.g., around 3200), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety and be cautious with Tier 1.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1838 → 1543 → 1611, with small fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is about 1611. The enrollment plan for History Category was 20 in 2023, 42 in 2024, and 20 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 20, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, a top-tier engineering powerhouse. Although liberal arts programs are few, they benefit from the university's brand. The Economics and Management Pilot Class corresponds to Business Administration (A) and Management Science and Engineering (A); the English major corresponds to Foreign Languages and Literature (A-); the disciplines are relatively strong. The HIT brand has a neutral to positive overall reputation; ranked 10th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high social attention; no abnormal admission records have been observed.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Accounting (a 2026 enrollment major) belongs to the economics and management category, with social popularity showing divided观望. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Hebei Province is approximately 245,000, a slight increase from 2025. The university is located in Weihai, Shandong, not within Hebei Province, but the HIT brand has strong national appeal, limiting regional impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1611, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the slight increase in History Category examinees in Hebei Province, and the high popularity of the HIT brand, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 1631, with a range of 1431–1831.
